tweet: What’s more, people shouldn’t be threatened with the loss of their housing because of this pandemic. Nearly 11 million households in America spend more than 50 percent of their income on housing.

tweet: Now, more than ever, Democrats and Republicans need to come together and craft a relief package that meets the needs of Americans who are hurting.   I have a sense of urgency about seeing a COVID relief bill pass.
